data.title: Coinbase's current P/E ratio is about 22 times, and it may merge with traditional exchanges
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase has the conditions to become an acquisition target. If it can merge with a traditional exchange, it will be able to create a company with both expertise and industry influence, and thus dominate the current fragmented cryptocurrency market.
Currently, Coinbase's price-to-earnings ratio is about 22 times, and its total market value is about $52 billion, but large US exchanges have the ability to make this deal come true. The Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange, has a market value of $100 billion and a price-to-earnings ratio of 36 times. Its CEO Jeffrey Sprecher's wife Kelly Loeffler is a member of the Trump administration cabinet.
The global futures trading giant Chicago Mercantile Exchange Group (CME Group) has a market value of $93 billion and a price-to-earnings ratio of 26 times. The Nasdaq Exchange is known for its technological strength and global network, with a market value of $47 billion and a price-to-earnings ratio of 41 times. If it can cooperate with major US exchanges, Coinbase will be able to open the door to power and markets, and these resources may still be out of reach for it.
Large investors may push a top exchange to acquire Coinbase, and the new company will be able to maximize investment returns as cryptocurrencies gradually move from the financial frontier to the mainstream. (Barrons)

data.title: Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act Signals Bitcoin's Global Recognition
data.description: According to Odaily, Zhu Su recently commented on the X platform about the establishment of the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act. He noted that this development sends a significant message, as Bitcoin has long faced the risk of being perceived as a challenger to the U.S. dollar or as a tool for facilitating 'illegal' fund transfers. The Strategic Bitcoin Reserve positions Bitcoin as a digital bearer asset on par with gold, a recognition expected to be acknowledged in the West and globally. Zhu Su emphasized that the U.S. government does not need to accumulate millions of Bitcoins but should instead focus on making Bitcoin a singular coordinated point for digital value storage.

data.title: Zhu Su: The establishment of the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act means that BTC is no longer seen as a "challenger to the US dollar"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Zhu Su wrote on the X platform that the establishment of the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act released an important signal, because the biggest risk facing Bitcoin over the years is being seen as a challenger to the US dollar, or being seen as a protocol that facilitates "illegal" transfers of funds. The Strategic Bitcoin Reserve allows Bitcoin to be regarded as a digital bearer asset at the same level as gold, which will be recognized in the West and even the world. The US government does not need to accumulate millions of Bitcoins, but only needs to make Bitcoin a single coordination point for digital value storage.

data.title: AB is Now Listed on Hotcoin and Set to Launch on Gate, BitMart, Lbank, and Biconomy
data.description:
On March 8, 2025, AB DAO announced that $AB has officially been listed on Hotcoin (hotcoin.com) at 18:00 (UTC+8), further expanding its global trading network and driving AB’s adoption in the Web3 ecosystem. Additionally, $AB is set to be listed on four more major exchanges: Gate (gate.io), BitMart (bitmart.com), Lbank (lbank.com), and Biconomy (biconomy.com), significantly enhancing AB’s global liquidity and ecosystem reach.

AB Trading Details
Trading Pair: AB/USDT
Deposit Opening: March 7, 2025, 12:00 (UTC+8)
Trading Opening: March 8, 2025, 18:00 (UTC+8)
Hotcoin Official Announcement:

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 86,000 USDT with a 3.52% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 08, 2025, 09:49 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 86,000 USDT and is now trading at 85,975.570313 USDT, with a narrowed 3.52% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls Below $86,000 Amid Daily Decline
data.description: According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market witnessed a notable shift as Bitcoin's value dropped below the $86,000 mark. As of the latest update, Bitcoin is trading at $85,993.40 per coin, reflecting a 2.77% decrease within the day.

data.title: xAI Expands With New Property Acquisition In Memphis
data.description: According to PANews, xAI, an artificial intelligence company founded by Elon Musk, has acquired a 1 million square foot property in southwest Memphis. This move follows the company's announcement last December to expand its supercomputer, Colossus, in the city. The Greater Memphis Chamber released a statement on March 7, indicating that the new facility will complement xAI's existing operations and support its expansion in Memphis. The Chamber noted that the Colossus supercomputer is progressing towards the 'supercluster scale' announced by xAI last year.

data.title: Sui Soars 15% After Partnership With World Liberty Financial
